title: A Decisive Matchup in the Onigashima Raid
description: On pages 14–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Luffy as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I knew it would wind up like this..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: So, I’m not sure if I’m

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You added a new weapon to your Arsenal and got cocky...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Humans always cling on to faith.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In a way, they can't afford to abandon it... and that can be dangerous!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's been a while since I got this fired up. What a mistake...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I should've taken your head as a trophy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their faith in you will never die. Isn't that right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy Falls! What's going to happen to wano?!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 15 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
